title: rubus remotior
intro: Rubus remotior, also known as Himalayan raspberry, is a species of raspberry that is native to the Himalayan region of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, and is traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus remotior include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rubus remotior include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
